components.value: V, S, M (a drop of water)

description.value: Your senses become preternaturally keen, and you gain insight into subtle behavioral cues. For the duration of the spell, you receive a +5 competence bonus on Perception and Sense Motive checks. Section 15: Copyright Notice Advanced Player’s Guide.
